```dart
                      title: "إيداع / تحويل بنكي",
                      subtitle: "قم بالتحويل لحسابنا في بنك الكريمي",
                      value: 'bank_transfer',
                      icon: Icons.account_balance,
                    ),
                    const Divider(height: 1, indent: 70),
                    _buildPaymentMethodOption(
                      title: "الدفع نقداً عند الاستلام",
                      subtitle: "متاح لمواد الإكساء والطلبات الصغيرة",
                      value: 'cash',
                      icon: Icons.payments_outlined,
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 32),

              // Order Summary Segment
              _buildSectionTitle("ملخص الطلب"),
              Container(
                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20),
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: Colors.white,
                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
                  border: Border.all(color: Colors.grey.shade100),
                ),
                child: Column(
                  children: [
                    _buildSummaryRow("قيمة المواد (${cartItems.length} أصناف)", _fmt(totalAmount)),
                    _buildSummaryRow("رسوم التوصيل المقدرة", "25,000"),
                    _buildSummaryRow("الضريبة (0%)", "0"),
                    const Padding(padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16), child: Divider()),
                    Row(
                      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
                      children: [
                        Text("الإجمالي المستحق", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 16, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                        Text("${_fmt(totalAmount + 25000)} ر.ي", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: AppColors.primary)),
                      ],
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 40),
            ],
          ),
        ),
      ),
      bottomNavigationBar: cartAsync.maybeWhen(
        data: (items) => Container(
          padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20),
          decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.white, boxShadow: [BoxShadow(color: Colors.black.withValues(alpha: 0.05), blurRadius: 10, offset: const Offset(0, -5))]),
          child: SafeArea(
            child: ElevatedButton(
              onPressed: (_isLoading || items.isEmpty) ? null : () => _confirmOrder(items, totalAmount),
              style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                backgroundColor: AppColors.primary,
                padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16),
                shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12)),
                elevation: 0,
              ),
              child: _isLoading 
                  ? const SizedBox(width: 24, height: 24, child: CircularProgressIndicator(color: Colors.white, strokeWidth: 2)) 
                  : Text("تأكيد وطلب المواد", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.white, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16)),
            ),
          ),
        ),
        orElse: () => null,
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSectionTitle(String title) {
    return Padding(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 12),
      child: Text(title, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 18, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: AppColors.textPrimary)),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildPaymentMethodOption({required String title, required String subtitle, required String value, required IconData icon}) {
    final isSelected = _paymentMethod == value;
    return InkWell(
      onTap: () => setState(() => _paymentMethod = value),
      child: Padding(
        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 8),
        child: Row(
          children: [
            const SizedBox(width: 16),
            Container(
              padding: const EdgeInsets.all(10),
              decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.grey.shade50, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)),
              child: Icon(icon, color: isSelected ? AppColors.primary : Colors.grey),
            ),
            const SizedBox(width: 16),
            Expanded(
              child: Column(
                crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
                children: [
                  Text(title, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 14)),
                  Text(subtitle, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 11)),
                ],
              ),
            ),
            Radio(
              value: value,
              groupValue: _paymentMethod,
              activeColor: AppColors.primary,
              onChanged: (val) => setState(() => _paymentMethod = val as String),
            ),
            const SizedBox(width: 8),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSummaryRow(String label, String value) {
    return Padding(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 4.0),
      child: Row(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
        children: [
          Text(label, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey.shade700, fontSize: 13)),
          Text("$value ر.ي", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 14)),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

```

## `lib/features/marketplace/presentation/screens/favorites_screen.dart`
```dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:google_fonts/google_fonts.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import '../../../../core/theme/app_colors.dart';
import '../providers/favorites_providers.dart';

class FavoritesScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {
  const FavoritesScreen({super.key});

  @override
  ConsumerState<FavoritesScreen> createState() => _FavoritesScreenState();
}

class _FavoritesScreenState extends ConsumerState<FavoritesScreen>
    with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin {
  late TabController _tabController;

  @override
  void initState() {
    super.initState();
    _tabController = TabController(length: 3, vsync: this);
  }

  @override
  void dispose() {
    _tabController.dispose();
    super.dispose();
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text('المفضلة', style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.white)),
        backgroundColor: AppColors.primary,
        foregroundColor: Colors.white,
        bottom: TabBar(
          controller: _tabController,
          indicatorColor: Colors.white,
          labelColor: Colors.white,
          unselectedLabelColor: Colors.white70,
          labelStyle: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 13),
          tabs: const [
            Tab(text: 'المنتجات'),
            Tab(text: 'المقاولون'),
            Tab(text: 'الموردون'),
          ],
        ),
      ),
      backgroundColor: AppColors.background,
      body: TabBarView(
        controller: _tabController,
        children: [
          _FavoriteProductsTab(),
          _FavoriteContractorsTab(),
          _FavoriteSuppliersTab(),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

// ─── Products Tab ────────────────────────────────────────────
class _FavoriteProductsTab extends ConsumerWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    final faves = ref.watch(favoriteProductsProvider);
    return faves.when(
      loading: () => const Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),
      error: (e, _) => _buildError('خطأ في تحميل المنتجات المفضلة'),
      data: (items) {
        if (items.isEmpty) return _buildEmpty('لا توجد منتجات مفضلة بعد');
        return RefreshIndicator(
          onRefresh: () => ref.refresh(favoriteProductsProvider.future),
          child: ListView.builder(
            padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
            itemCount: items.length,
            itemBuilder: (context, i) {
              final fav = items[i];
              final product = _nested(fav['products']);
              final images = product?['product_images'] as List? ?? [];
              final imageUrl = images.isNotEmpty ? images[0]['image_url'] : null;
              final name = product?['name_ar'] ?? '—';
              final price = product?['price']?.toString() ?? '—';

              return Card(
                color: Colors.white,
                margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 12),
                elevation: 0,
                shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
                  side: BorderSide(color: Colors.grey.shade100),
                ),
                child: ListTile(
                  contentPadding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
                  leading: ClipRRect(
                    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
                    child: imageUrl != null
                        ? Image.network(imageUrl, width: 56, height: 56, fit: BoxFit.cover)
                        : Container(
                            width: 56, height: 56,
                            color: Colors.grey.shade100,
                            child: const Icon(Icons.inventory_2_outlined, color: Colors.grey),
                          ),
                  ),
                  title: Text(name, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 14)),
                  subtitle: Text('$price ر.ي', style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: AppColors.primary, fontSize: 13, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                  trailing: IconButton(
                    icon: const Icon(Icons.delete_outline, color: Colors.red),
                    onPressed: () => removeFavorite(ref, fav['id']),
                  ),
                  onTap: () {
                    if (product?['id'] != null) {
                      context.push('/product-details/${product!['id']}');
                    }
                  },
                ),
              );
            },
          ),
        );
      },
    );
  }
}

// ─── Contractors Tab ─────────────────────────────────────────
class _FavoriteContractorsTab extends ConsumerWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    final faves = ref.watch(favoriteContractorsProvider);
    return faves.when(
      loading: () => const Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),
      error: (e, _) => _buildError('خطأ في تحميل المقاولين المفضلين'),
      data: (items) {
        if (items.isEmpty) return _buildEmpty('لا يوجد مقاولون مفضلون بعد');
        return RefreshIndicator(
          onRefresh: () => ref.refresh(favoriteContractorsProvider.future),
          child: ListView.builder(
            padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
            itemCount: items.length,
            itemBuilder: (context, i) {
              final fav = items[i];
              final contractor = _nested(fav['contractors']);
              final city = _nested(contractor?['cities']);
              final name = contractor?['user_name'] ?? '—';
              final cityName = city?['name_ar'] ?? '';
              final rating = contractor?['rating']?.toStringAsFixed(1) ?? '—';

              return Card(
                color: Colors.white,
                margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 12),
                elevation: 0,
                shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
                  side: BorderSide(color: Colors.grey.shade100),
                ),
                child: ListTile(
                  leading: CircleAvatar(
                    backgroundColor: AppColors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.1),
                    child: Text(name.isNotEmpty ? name[0] : '؟',
                        style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: AppColors.primary, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                  ),
                  title: Text(name, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 14)),
                  subtitle: Text(
                    '$cityName • ⭐ $rating',
                    style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 12),
                  ),
                  trailing: IconButton(
                    icon: const Icon(Icons.delete_outline, color: Colors.red),
                    onPressed: () => removeFavorite(ref, fav['id']),
                  ),
                  onTap: () {
                    if (contractor?['id'] != null) {
                      context.push('/contractor-profile/${contractor!['id']}');
                    }
                  },
                ),
              );
            },
          ),
        );
      },
    );
  }
}

// ─── Suppliers Tab ───────────────────────────────────────────
class _FavoriteSuppliersTab extends ConsumerWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    final faves = ref.watch(favoriteSuppliersProvider);
    return faves.when(
      loading: () => const Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),
      error: (e, _) => _buildError('خطأ في تحميل الموردين المفضلين'),
      data: (items) {
        if (items.isEmpty) return _buildEmpty('لا يوجد موردون مفضلون بعد');
        return RefreshIndicator(
          onRefresh: () => ref.refresh(favoriteSuppliersProvider.future),
          child: ListView.builder(
            padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
            itemCount: items.length,
            itemBuilder: (context, i) {
              final fav = items[i];
              final supplier = _nested(fav['suppliers']);
              final city = _nested(supplier?['cities']);
              final name = supplier?['user_name'] ?? '—';
              final cityName = city?['name_ar'] ?? '';

              return Card(
                color: Colors.white,
                margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 12),
                elevation: 0,
                shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
                  side: BorderSide(color: Colors.grey.shade100),
                ),
                child: ListTile(
                  leading: CircleAvatar(
                    backgroundColor: Colors.orange.withValues(alpha: 0.1),
                    child: const Icon(Icons.store_outlined, color: Colors.orange),
                  ),
                  title: Text(name, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 14)),
                  subtitle: Text(cityName, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 12)),
                  trailing: IconButton(
                    icon: const Icon(Icons.delete_outline, color: Colors.red),
                    onPressed: () => removeFavorite(ref, fav['id']),
                  ),
                  onTap: () {
                    if (supplier?['id'] != null) {
                      context.push('/supplier-store/${supplier!['id']}');
                    }
                  },
                ),
              );
            },
          ),
        );
      },
    );
  }
}

// ─── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
Map<String, dynamic>? _nested(dynamic val) {
  if (val == null) return null;
  if (val is Map<String, dynamic>) return val;
  if (val is List && val.isNotEmpty) return val[0] as Map<String, dynamic>?;
  return null;
}

Widget _buildEmpty(String msg) {
  return Center(
    child: Column(
      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
      children: [
        Icon(Icons.favorite_border, size: 64, color: Colors.grey.shade300),
        const SizedBox(height: 12),
        Text(msg, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 15)),
      ],
    ),
  );
}

Widget _buildError(String msg) {
  return Center(child: Text(msg, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.red)));
}

```

## `lib/features/marketplace/presentation/screens/marketplace_screen.dart`
```dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import 'package:google_fonts/google_fonts.dart';
import '../../../../core/theme/app_colors.dart';
import '../providers/marketplace_providers.dart';
import '../../domain/models/marketplace_models.dart';
import 'package:intl/intl.dart';

class MarketplaceScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {
  const MarketplaceScreen({super.key});

  @override
  ConsumerState<MarketplaceScreen> createState() => _MarketplaceScreenState();
}

class _MarketplaceScreenState extends ConsumerState<MarketplaceScreen> {
  final GlobalKey<ScaffoldState> _scaffoldKey = GlobalKey<ScaffoldState>();
  String? _selectedCategoryId;
  String _searchQuery = '';
  double? _minPrice;
  double? _maxPrice;

  String _fmt(double n) {
    return "${NumberFormat.currency(symbol: '', decimalDigits: 0).format(n)} ر.ي";
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    // Remove unused cartAsync access if not needed for badge here, 
    // it's already handled by the cart badge in AppBar if applicable
    final productsAsync = ref.watch(marketplaceProductsProvider((
      categoryId: _selectedCategoryId, 
      query: _searchQuery,
      minPrice: _minPrice,
      maxPrice: _maxPrice,
    )));

    return Scaffold(
      key: _scaffoldKey,
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: const Text("سوق معمارك"),
        actions: [
          IconButton(
            icon: Badge(
              label: Text(ref.watch(cartProvider.notifier).itemCount.toString()),
              isLabelVisible: ref.watch(cartProvider.notifier).itemCount > 0,
              child: const Icon(Icons.shopping_cart),
            ),
            onPressed: () => context.push('/cart'),
          ),
          IconButton(
            icon: const Icon(Icons.filter_list),
            onPressed: () => _scaffoldKey.currentState?.openEndDrawer(),
          ),
        ],
      ),
      endDrawer: _buildFilterDrawer(),
      backgroundColor: AppColors.background,
      body: Column(
        children: [
          _buildSearchBar(),
          _buildCategoryBar(),
          Expanded(
            child: productsAsync.when(
              data: (products) => _buildProductGrid(products),
              loading: () => const Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),
              error: (e, _) => Center(child: Text("خطأ: $e", style: GoogleFonts.cairo())),
            ),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSearchBar() {
    return Container(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 12),
      color: Colors.white,
      child: TextField(
        onChanged: (val) => setState(() => _searchQuery = val),
        decoration: InputDecoration(
          hintText: "ابحث عن مواد بناء، أسمنت، حديد...",
          prefixIcon: const Icon(Icons.search, color: AppColors.primary),
          contentPadding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 0),
          filled: true,
          fillColor: AppColors.background,
          border: OutlineInputBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12), borderSide: BorderSide.none),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildCategoryBar() {
    final categoriesAsync = ref.watch(marketplaceCategoriesProvider);
    return Container(
      height: 60,
      color: Colors.white,
      child: categoriesAsync.when(
        data: (categories) {
          final allCats = [CategoryItem(id: 'الكل', nameAr: 'الكل'), ...categories];
          return ListView.builder(
            scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,
            padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 8),
            itemCount: allCats.length,
            itemBuilder: (context, index) {
              final cat = allCats[index];
              final isSelected = (_selectedCategoryId ?? 'الكل') == cat.id;
              return Padding(
                padding: const EdgeInsets.only(left: 8.0),
                child: ChoiceChip(
                  label: Text(
                    cat.nameAr,
                    style: GoogleFonts.cairo(
                      color: isSelected ? Colors.white : AppColors.textPrimary,
                      fontWeight: isSelected ? FontWeight.bold : FontWeight.normal,
                      fontSize: 12,
                    ),
                  ),
                  selected: isSelected,
                  selectedColor: AppColors.primary,
                  backgroundColor: AppColors.background,
                  onSelected: (val) {
                    if (val) setState(() => _selectedCategoryId = cat.id);
                  },
                ),
              );
            },
          );
        },
        loading: () => const Center(child: LinearProgressIndicator()),
        error: (_, __) => const SizedBox.shrink(),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildProductGrid(List<Product> products) {
    if (products.isEmpty) {
      return Center(
        child: Column(
          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
          children: [
            Icon(Icons.inventory_2_outlined, size: 80, color: Colors.grey.shade300),
            const SizedBox(height: 16),
            Text("لا توجد منتجات مطابقة للبحث", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 16, color: Colors.grey)),
          ],
        ),
      );
    }

    return RefreshIndicator(
      onRefresh: () => ref.refresh(marketplaceProductsProvider((
        categoryId: _selectedCategoryId, 
        query: _searchQuery,
        minPrice: _minPrice,
        maxPrice: _maxPrice,
      )).future),
      child: GridView.builder(
        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
        gridDelegate: const SliverGridDelegateWithFixedCrossAxisCount(
          crossAxisCount: 2,
          childAspectRatio: 0.68,
          crossAxisSpacing: 16,
          mainAxisSpacing: 16,
        ),
        itemCount: products.length,
        itemBuilder: (context, index) => _buildProductCard(products[index]),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildProductCard(Product product) {
    final imageUrl = product.images.isNotEmpty ? product.images[0].imageUrl : null;
    final vendorName = product.suppliers?['user_name'] ?? 'مورد عام';

    return GestureDetector(
      onTap: () => context.push('/product-details/${product.id}'),
      child: Card(
        color: Colors.white,
        elevation: 0,
        shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16), side: BorderSide(color: Colors.grey.shade100)),
        child: Column(
          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
          children: [
            Expanded(
              flex: 5,
              child: Stack(
                children: [
                  Container(
                    width: double.infinity,
                    decoration: BoxDecoration(
                      color: Colors.grey.shade50,
                      borderRadius: const BorderRadius.vertical(top: Radius.circular(16)),
                      image: imageUrl != null ? DecorationImage(image: NetworkImage(imageUrl), fit: BoxFit.cover) : null,
                    ),
                    child: imageUrl == null ? Center(child: Icon(Icons.image, size: 40, color: Colors.grey.shade300)) : null,
                  ),
                  if (product.discountPrice != null)
                    Positioned(
                      top: 8,
                      right: 8,
                      child: Container(
                        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8, vertical: 4),
                        decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.red, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
                        child: Text("خصم", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 10, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                      ),
                    ),
                ],
              ),
            ),
            Expanded(
              flex: 6,
              child: Padding(
                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12.0),
                child: Column(
                  crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
                  children: [
                    Text(
                      product.nameAr,
                      style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 13, height: 1.2),
                      maxLines: 2,
                      overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(height: 4),
                    Row(
                      children: [
                        const Icon(Icons.store, size: 12, color: Colors.grey),
                        const SizedBox(width: 4),
                        Expanded(child: Text(vendorName, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 10), overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis)),
                      ],
                    ),
                    const Spacer(),
                    Text(
                      _fmt(product.price),
                      style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: AppColors.primary, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 15),
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(height: 8),
                    SizedBox(
                      width: double.infinity,
                      child: ElevatedButton(
                        style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                          backgroundColor: AppColors.primary,
                          foregroundColor: Colors.white,
                          padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 8),
                          shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)),
                          elevation: 0,
                        ),
                        onPressed: () {
                          ref.read(cartProvider.notifier).addToCart(product);
                          ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
                            SnackBar(
                              content: Text("تم إضافة ${product.nameAr} للسلة", style: GoogleFonts.cairo()),
                              duration: const Duration(seconds: 1),
                              backgroundColor: AppColors.success,
                              behavior: SnackBarBehavior.floating,
                            ),
                          );
                        },
                        child: Text("أضف للسلة", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 11, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                      ),
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
              ),
            ),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildFilterDrawer() {
    return Drawer(
      backgroundColor: Colors.white,
      child: SafeArea(
        child: Column(
          children: [
            Padding(
              padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20.0),
              child: Row(
                children: [
                  Text("فلترة المنتجات", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 18, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                  const Spacer(),
                  IconButton(icon: const Icon(Icons.close), onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context)),
                ],
              ),
            ),
            const Divider(),
            Expanded(
              child: ListView(
                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20),
                children: [
                  Text("نطاق السعر (ر.ي)", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                  const SizedBox(height: 16),
                  RangeSlider(
                    values: RangeValues(_minPrice ?? 0, _maxPrice ?? 500000),
                    min: 0,
                    max: 1000000,
                    divisions: 20,
                    activeColor: AppColors.primary,
                    labels: RangeLabels(_fmt(_minPrice ?? 0), _fmt(_maxPrice ?? 500000)),
                    onChanged: (val) => setState(() {
                      _minPrice = val.start;
                      _maxPrice = val.end;
                    }),
                  ),
                  const SizedBox(height: 32),
                  Text("فرز حسب المورد", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                  const SizedBox(height: 12),
                  // Future: Add vendor filters
                  Text("سيتم إضافة موردين مختارين في التحديث القادم", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 12)),
                ],
              ),
            ),
            Padding(
              padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20),
              child: Row(
                children: [
                  Expanded(
                    child: OutlinedButton(
                      onPressed: () => setState(() {
                        _minPrice = null;
                        _maxPrice = null;
                        Navigator.pop(context);
                      }),
                      child: Text("إعادة تعيين", style: GoogleFonts.cairo()),
                    ),
                  ),
                  const SizedBox(width: 16),
                  Expanded(
                    child: ElevatedButton(
                      onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context),
                      child: Text("تطبيق", style: GoogleFonts.cairo()),
                    ),
                  ),
                ],
              ),
            ),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}

```

## `lib/features/marketplace/presentation/screens/my_orders_screen.dart`
```dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:google_fonts/google_fonts.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import 'package:intl/intl.dart';
import '../../../../core/theme/app_colors.dart';
import '../providers/marketplace_providers.dart';
import '../../domain/models/marketplace_models.dart';

class MyOrdersScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {
  const MyOrdersScreen({super.key});

  @override
  ConsumerState<MyOrdersScreen> createState() => _MyOrdersScreenState();
}

class _MyOrdersScreenState extends ConsumerState<MyOrdersScreen> with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin {
  late TabController _tabController;

  String _fmt(double n) {
    return NumberFormat.currency(symbol: '', decimalDigits: 0).format(n);
  }

  @override
  void initState() {
    super.initState();
    _tabController = TabController(length: 3, vsync: this);
  }

  @override
  void dispose() {
    _tabController.dispose();
    super.dispose();
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    final ordersAsync = ref.watch(userOrdersProvider);

    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: const Text("طلبات المواد"),
        backgroundColor: AppColors.primary,
        foregroundColor: Colors.white,
        elevation: 0,
        bottom: TabBar(
          controller: _tabController,
          indicatorColor: Colors.white,
          indicatorWeight: 3,
          labelColor: Colors.white,
          unselectedLabelColor: Colors.white70,
          labelStyle: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 13),
          tabs: const [
            Tab(text: "قيد التنفيذ"),
            Tab(text: "مكتملة"),
            Tab(text: "ملغاة"),
          ],
        ),
      ),
      backgroundColor: AppColors.background,
      body: ordersAsync.when(
        loading: () => const Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),
        error: (e, _) => Center(child: Text("خطأ في تحميل الطلبات: $e", style: GoogleFonts.cairo())),
        data: (orders) {
          return TabBarView(
            controller: _tabController,
            children: [
              _buildOrdersList(orders.where((o) => ['pending', 'processing', 'shipped'].contains(o.status)).toList(), "لا توجد طلبات جارية حالياً"),
              _buildOrdersList(orders.where((o) => o.status == 'delivered').toList(), "سجل طلباتك المكتملة سيظهر هنا"),
              _buildOrdersList(orders.where((o) => o.status == 'cancelled').toList(), "لا توجد طلبات ملغاة"),
            ],
          );
        },
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildEmptyOrders(String message) {
    return Center(
      child: Column(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
        children: [
          Icon(Icons.inventory_2_outlined, size: 80, color: Colors.grey.shade200),
          const SizedBox(height: 16),
          Text(message, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 16, color: Colors.grey)),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildOrdersList(List<OrderModel> filtered, String emptyMsg) {
    if (filtered.isEmpty) return _buildEmptyOrders(emptyMsg);

    return RefreshIndicator(
      onRefresh: () => ref.refresh(userOrdersProvider.future),
      child: ListView.builder(
        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
        itemCount: filtered.length,
        itemBuilder: (context, index) {
          final order = filtered[index];
          final shortId = order.id.substring(0, 8).toUpperCase();
          final createdAt = order.createdAt != null 
              ? DateFormat('yyyy/MM/dd').format(DateTime.parse(order.createdAt!)) 
              : '—';
          
          Color statusColor;
          String statusText;
          
          switch (order.status) {
            case 'pending': statusColor = Colors.orange; statusText = "قيد المراجعة"; break;
            case 'processing': statusColor = Colors.blue; statusText = "قيد التجهيز"; break;
            case 'shipped': statusColor = Colors.purple; statusText = "تم الشحن"; break;
            case 'delivered': statusColor = Colors.green; statusText = "تم التسليم"; break;
            case 'cancelled': statusColor = Colors.red; statusText = "ملغي"; break;
            default: statusColor = Colors.grey; statusText = order.status;
          }

          return Card(
            color: Colors.white,
            margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 16),
            elevation: 0,
            shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16), side: BorderSide(color: Colors.grey.shade100)),
            child: InkWell(
              onTap: () {}, // Future: Order details screen
              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
              child: Padding(
                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16.0),
                child: Column(
                  crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
                  children: [
                    Row(
                      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
                      children: [
                        Row(
                          children: [
                            const Icon(Icons.shopping_bag_outlined, color: AppColors.primary, size: 20),
                            const SizedBox(width: 8),
                            Text("طلب #$shortId", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 15)),
                          ],
                        ),
                        Container(
                          padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10, vertical: 4),
                          decoration: BoxDecoration(color: statusColor.withValues(alpha: 0.1), borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)),
                          child: Text(statusText, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: statusColor, fontSize: 11, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                        ),
                      ],
                    ),
                    const Padding(padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 12), child: Divider(height: 1)),
                    Row(
                      children: [
                        _buildInfoColumn("تاريخ الطلب", createdAt),
                        _buildInfoColumn("عدد الأصناف", "${order.items.length} مواد"),
                        _buildInfoColumn("طريقة الدفع", order.paymentMethod == 'bank_transfer' ? "تحويل" : "نقدي"),
                      ],
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(height: 16),
                    Row(
                      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
                      children: [
                        Text("إجمالي المبلغ", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: AppColors.textSecondary, fontSize: 13)),
                        Text("${_fmt(order.totalAmount)} ر.ي", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 18, color: AppColors.primary)),
                      ],
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(height: 12),
                    SizedBox(
                      width: double.infinity,
                      child: OutlinedButton(
                        onPressed: () => context.push('/order-details/${order.id}'),
                        style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(
                          padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 10),
                          shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)),
                          side: BorderSide(color: AppColors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.2)),
                        ),
                        child: Text("عرض التفاصيل", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 12, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: AppColors.primary)),
                      ),
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
              ),
            ),
          );
        },
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildInfoColumn(String label, String value) {
    return Expanded(
      child: Column(
        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
        children: [
          Text(label, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 11)),
          const SizedBox(height: 4),
          Text(value, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 13), overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

```

## `lib/features/marketplace/presentation/screens/order_details_screen.dart`
```dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:google_fonts/google_fonts.dart';
import '../../../../core/theme/app_colors.dart';

class OrderDetailsScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {
  final String orderId;
  const OrderDetailsScreen({super.key, required this.orderId});

  @override
  ConsumerState<OrderDetailsScreen> createState() => _OrderDetailsScreenState();
}

class _OrderDetailsScreenState extends ConsumerState<OrderDetailsScreen> {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text("تفاصيل الطلب ${widget.orderId}", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16)),
        backgroundColor: AppColors.primary,
        foregroundColor: Colors.white,
      ),
      backgroundColor: AppColors.background,
      body: SingleChildScrollView(
        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16.0),
        child: Column(
          children: [
            _buildStatusTracker(),
            const SizedBox(height: 16),
            _buildSupplierBadge(),
            const SizedBox(height: 16),
            _buildItemsList(),
            const SizedBox(height: 16),
            _buildFinancialSummary(),
            const SizedBox(height: 16),
            _buildDeliveryInfo(),
            const SizedBox(height: 24),
            _buildActionButtons(),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildStatusTracker() {
    // Simplified status tracker
    return Container(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20),
      decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.white, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)),
      child: Column(
        children: [
          Row(
            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
            children: [
              _buildStatusStep("تم الطلب", true, '14:30'),
              _buildStatusStep("قيد التجهيز", true, '15:10'),
              _buildStatusStep("تم الشحن", true, '17:45'),
              _buildStatusStep("تم التسليم", true, '18:30'),
            ],
          ),
          const SizedBox(height: 16),
          LinearProgressIndicator(value: 1.0, color: Colors.green, backgroundColor: Colors.grey.shade200),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildStatusStep(String label, bool isDone, String time) {
    return Column(
      children: [
        Icon(Icons.check_circle, color: isDone ? Colors.green : Colors.grey.shade300, size: 20),
        const SizedBox(height: 4),
        Text(label, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 10, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
        Text(time, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 9, color: Colors.grey)),
      ],
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSupplierBadge() {
    return Container(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
      decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.white, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)),
      child: Row(
        children: [
          const CircleAvatar(backgroundColor: AppColors.primary, child: Icon(Icons.store, color: Colors.white)),
          const SizedBox(width: 12),
          Expanded(
            child: Column(
              crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
              children: [
                Text("مؤسسة النور لمواد البناء", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 14)),
                Text("صنعاء، اليمن", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 11, color: Colors.grey)),
              ],
            ),
          ),
          IconButton(icon: const Icon(Icons.chat_outlined, color: AppColors.primary), onPressed: () {}),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildItemsList() {
    return Container(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
      decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.white, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)),
      child: Column(
        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
        children: [
          Text("مكونات الطلب", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 14)),
          const Divider(),
          _buildItemRow("إسمنت عمران مقاوم", 4500, 20),
          _buildItemRow("حديد تسليح 12 ملم", 350000, 1),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildItemRow(String title, int price, int qty) {
    return Padding(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 8.0),
      child: Row(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
        children: [
          Text("$title ($qty)", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 13)),
          Text("${price * qty} ر.ي", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 13)),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildFinancialSummary() {
    return Container(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
      decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.white, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)),
      child: Column(
        children: [
          _buildSummaryRow("قيمة المواد", "440,000 ر.ي"),
          _buildSummaryRow("رسوم التوصيل", "25,000 ر.ي"),
          const Divider(),
          Row(
            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
            children: [
                Text("الإجمالي الكلي", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 15)),
                Text("465,000 ر.ي", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 18, color: AppColors.primary)),
            ],
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSummaryRow(String label, String value) {
    return Padding(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 4.0),
      child: Row(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
        children: [
          Text(label, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 13)),
          Text(value, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 13)),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildDeliveryInfo() {
    return Container(
      width: double.infinity,
      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
      decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.white, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)),
      child: Column(
        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
        children: [
          Text("معلومات التوصيل", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 14)),
          const SizedBox(height: 8),
          Text("صنعاء، حي بيت بوس، عمارة الأمل، جوار سوبر ماركت الهدى", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 12, color: Colors.grey.shade800)),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildActionButtons() {
    return Column(
      children: [
        SizedBox(
          width: double.infinity,
          child: ElevatedButton.icon(
            onPressed: () {},
            icon: const Icon(Icons.upload_outlined),
            label: Text("رفع إثبات الدفع", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
            style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(backgroundColor: AppColors.primary, foregroundColor: Colors.white, padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16)),
          ),
        ),
        const SizedBox(height: 12),
        SizedBox(
          width: double.infinity,
          child: OutlinedButton.icon(
            onPressed: () {},
            icon: const Icon(Icons.star_outline),
            label: Text("تقييم هذا الطلب", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
            style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(foregroundColor: AppColors.primary, side: const BorderSide(color: AppColors.primary), padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16)),
          ),
        ),
      ],
    );
  }
}

```

## `lib/features/marketplace/presentation/screens/order_success_screen.dart`
```dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import 'package:google_fonts/google_fonts.dart';
import '../../../../core/theme/app_colors.dart';

class OrderSuccessScreen extends ConsumerWidget {
  const OrderSuccessScreen({super.key});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    return Scaffold(
      backgroundColor: Colors.white,
      body: SafeArea(
        child: Padding(
          padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 40, vertical: 24),
          child: Column(
            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
            crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.center,
            children: [
              const Spacer(),
              Container(
                width: 150,
                height: 150,
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: AppColors.success.withValues(alpha: 0.1),
                  shape: BoxShape.circle,
                ),
                child: const Icon(Icons.check_circle_rounded, size: 100, color: AppColors.success),
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 48),
              Text(
                "طلبك في طريقه إليك!",
                style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 28, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: AppColors.primary),
                textAlign: TextAlign.center,
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 16),
              Text(
                "شكراً لثقتك بمنصة معمارك. رقم الطلب الخاص بك هو #ORD-5092. سنقوم بإرسال إشعارات بتحديثات حالة الطلب.",
                style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 15, color: Colors.grey.shade600, height: 1.6),
                textAlign: TextAlign.center,
              ),
              const Spacer(),
              SizedBox(
                width: double.infinity,
                child: ElevatedButton(
                  onPressed: () => context.push('/my-orders'),
                  style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                    backgroundColor: AppColors.primary,
                    padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16),
                    shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12)),
                    elevation: 0,
                  ),
                  child: Text("تتبع طلبي الآن", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16, color: Colors.white)),
                ),
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 16),
              SizedBox(
                width: double.infinity,
                child: OutlinedButton(
                  onPressed: () => context.go('/customer-home'),
                  style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(
                    padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16),
                    shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12)),
                    side: const BorderSide(color: AppColors.primary),
                  ),
                  child: Text("العودة للرئيسية", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16, color: AppColors.primary)),
                ),
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 24),
            ],
          ),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}

```

## `lib/features/marketplace/presentation/screens/product_details_screen.dart`
```dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:google_fonts/google_fonts.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import '../../../../core/theme/app_colors.dart';
import '../providers/marketplace_providers.dart';
import '../../domain/models/marketplace_models.dart';
import 'package:intl/intl.dart';

class ProductDetailsScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {
  final String productId;
  const ProductDetailsScreen({super.key, required this.productId});

  @override
  ConsumerState<ProductDetailsScreen> createState() => _ProductDetailsScreenState();
}

class _ProductDetailsScreenState extends ConsumerState<ProductDetailsScreen> {
  int _quantity = 1;

  String _fmt(double n) {
    return "${NumberFormat.currency(symbol: '', decimalDigits: 0).format(n)} ر.ي";
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    final productAsync = ref.watch(marketplaceProductDetailsProvider(widget.productId));

    return productAsync.when(
      loading: () => const Scaffold(body: Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator())),
      error: (e, _) => Scaffold(body: Center(child: Text("خطأ: $e", style: GoogleFonts.cairo()))),
      data: (product) {
        if (product == null) return Scaffold(appBar: AppBar(), body: const Center(child: Text("المنتج غير موجود")));

        final imageUrl = product.images.isNotEmpty ? product.images[0].imageUrl : null;
        final supplier = product.suppliers;
        final categoryName = product.productCategories?['name_ar'] ?? 'غير محدد';

        return Scaffold(
          backgroundColor: Colors.white,
          body: CustomScrollView(
            slivers: [
              _buildSliverAppBar(product, imageUrl),
              SliverToBoxAdapter(
                child: Padding(
                  padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20.0),
                  child: Column(
                    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
                    children: [
                      Row(
                        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
                        children: [
                          Container(
                            padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10, vertical: 4),
                            decoration: BoxDecoration(color: AppColors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.1), borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
                            child: Text(categoryName, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: AppColors.primary, fontSize: 11, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                          ),
                          if (product.stockQuantity > 0)
                            Text("متوفر: ${product.stockQuantity}", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.green, fontSize: 12, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold))
                          else
                            Text("نفذت الكمية", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.red, fontSize: 12, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                        ],
                      ),
                      const SizedBox(height: 12),
                      Text(
                        product.nameAr,
                        style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 24, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold),
                      ),
                      const SizedBox(height: 16),
                      Text(_fmt(product.price),
                          style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 28, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: AppColors.primary)),
                      const SizedBox(height: 24),
                      
                      _buildSupplierCard(supplier),

                      const SizedBox(height: 32),
                      Text("وصف المنتج", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 18, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                      const SizedBox(height: 12),
                      Text(
                        product.description ?? 'لا يوجد وصف متاح لهذا المنتج.',
                        style: GoogleFonts.cairo(height: 1.6, color: Colors.grey.shade800, fontSize: 14),
                      ),
                      
                      if (product.specifications.isNotEmpty) ...[
                        const SizedBox(height: 32),
                        Text("المواصفات الفنية", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 18, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
                        const SizedBox(height: 12),
                        ...product.specifications.entries.map((e) => _buildSpecRow(e.key, e.value.toString())),
                      ],
                      const SizedBox(height: 40),
                    ],
                  ),
                ),
              ),
            ],
          ),
          bottomNavigationBar: _buildBottomBar(product),
        );
      },
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSliverAppBar(Product product, String? imageUrl) {
    return SliverAppBar(
      expandedHeight: 350,
      pinned: true,
      backgroundColor: AppColors.primary,
      flexibleSpace: FlexibleSpaceBar(
        background: Container(
          color: Colors.grey.shade100,
          child: imageUrl != null 
            ? Image.network(imageUrl, fit: BoxFit.contain) 
            : Center(child: Icon(Icons.photo_library, size: 80, color: Colors.grey.shade300)),
        ),
      ),
      actions: [
        IconButton(icon: const Icon(Icons.favorite_border), onPressed: () {}),
        IconButton(icon: const Icon(Icons.share), onPressed: () {}),
      ],
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSupplierCard(Map<String, dynamic>? supplier) {
    return InkWell(
      onTap: () => supplier != null ? context.push('/supplier-store/${supplier['id']}') : null,
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
      child: Container(
        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: AppColors.background,
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
          border: Border.all(color: Colors.grey.shade200),
        ),
        child: Row(
          children: [
            CircleAvatar(
              radius: 25,
              backgroundColor: Colors.white,
              backgroundImage: supplier?['profile_image_url'] != null ? NetworkImage(supplier!['profile_image_url']) : null,
              child: supplier?['profile_image_url'] == null ? const Icon(Icons.store, color: AppColors.primary) : null,
            ),
            const SizedBox(width: 12),
            Expanded(
              child: Column(
                crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
                children: [
                  Text(supplier?['user_name'] ?? 'مورد عام', style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 15)),
                  Text("${supplier?['cities']?['name_ar'] ?? 'اليمن'} - مورد معتمد", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 12)),
                ],
              ),
            ),
             const Icon(Icons.arrow_forward_ios, size: 14, color: Colors.grey),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildBottomBar(Product product) {
    final bool isOutOfStock = product.stockQuantity <= 0;

    return SafeArea(
      child: Container(
        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 20, vertical: 16),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: Colors.white,
          boxShadow: [BoxShadow(color: Colors.black.withValues(alpha: 0.05), blurRadius: 15, offset: const Offset(0, -5))],
        ),
        child: Row(
          children: [
             // Quantity Selector
             Container(
               decoration: BoxDecoration(
                 color: AppColors.background,
                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
               ),
               child: Row(
                 children: [
                   IconButton(
                     icon: const Icon(Icons.remove, size: 20),
                     onPressed: isOutOfStock ? null : () { if (_quantity > 1) setState(() => _quantity--); },
                   ),
                   Text("$_quantity", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 18)),
                   IconButton(
                     icon: const Icon(Icons.add, size: 20),
                     onPressed: isOutOfStock ? null : () => setState(() => _quantity++),
                   ),
                 ],
               ),
             ),
             const SizedBox(width: 16),
             // Add to Cart btn
             Expanded(
               child: ElevatedButton(
                 style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                   backgroundColor: AppColors.primary,
                   padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16),
                   shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12)),
                   elevation: 0,
                 ),
                 onPressed: isOutOfStock ? null : () {
                   ref.read(cartProvider.notifier).addToCart(product, quantity: _quantity);
                   ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
                     SnackBar(content: Text("تم إضافة $_quantity للمنتج إلى سلتك", style: GoogleFonts.cairo()), backgroundColor: AppColors.success)
                   );
                 },
                 child: Text(
                   isOutOfStock ? "نفذت الكمية" : "أضف للسلة (${_fmt(product.price * _quantity)})",
                   style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 15, color: Colors.white),
                 ),
               ),
             ),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSpecRow(String label, String value) {
    return Padding(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 8.0),
      child: Row(
        children: [
          Expanded(flex: 2, child: Text(label, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 13))),
          Expanded(flex: 3, child: Text(value, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 14))),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

```

## `lib/features/marketplace/presentation/screens/rate_contractor_screen.dart`
```dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:google_fonts/google_fonts.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import '../../../../core/theme/app_colors.dart';
import '../../../../core/providers/supabase_provider.dart';

final ratingProjectDataProvider = FutureProvider.family<Map<String, dynamic>, String>((ref, projectId) async {
  final supabase = ref.read(supabaseProvider);
  
  // Fetch project and assigned contractor user id
  // Note: projects.assigned_contractor_id links to contractors.id
  final projectRes = await supabase
      .from('projects')
      .select('*, contractors(user_id, user_name)')
      .eq('id', projectId)
      .single();
      
  return projectRes;
});

class RateContractorScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {
  final String projectId;
  const RateContractorScreen({super.key, required this.projectId});

  @override
  ConsumerState<RateContractorScreen> createState() => _RateContractorScreenState();
}

class _RateContractorScreenState extends ConsumerState<RateContractorScreen> {
  double _overallRating = 5.0;
  int _qualityRating = 5;
  int _timeRating = 5;
  int _commRating = 5;
  int _priceRating = 5;
  
  final TextEditingController _commentController = TextEditingController();
  bool _isSubmitting = false;

  @override
  void dispose() {
    _commentController.dispose();
    super.dispose();
  }

  Future<void> _submitRating(String raterId, String ratedId) async {
    if (_isSubmitting) return;

    setState(() => _isSubmitting = true);
    final supabase = ref.read(supabaseProvider);

    try {
      await supabase.from('ratings').insert({
        'project_id': widget.projectId,
        'rater_id': raterId,
        'rated_id': ratedId,
        'rating': _overallRating.toInt(),
        'quality_rating': _qualityRating,
        'time_rating': _timeRating,
        'price_rating': _priceRating,
        'communication_rating': _commRating,
        'comment': _commentController.text,
        'type': 'contractor',
      });

      if (mounted) {
        ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
          SnackBar(
            content: Text("شكرًا لتقييمك! تم إرسال التقييم بنجاح", style: GoogleFonts.cairo()),
            backgroundColor: AppColors.success,
          ),
        );
        context.pop();
      }
    } catch (e) {
      if (mounted) {
        ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
          SnackBar(
            content: Text("حدث خطأ أثناء إرسال التقييم: $e", style: GoogleFonts.cairo()),
            backgroundColor: AppColors.error,
          ),
        );
      }
    } finally {
      if (mounted) setState(() => _isSubmitting = false);
    }
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    final projectDataAsync = ref.watch(ratingProjectDataProvider(widget.projectId));
    final currentUser = ref.watch(currentUserProvider);

    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text("تقييم المقاول", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16)),
        backgroundColor: AppColors.primary,
        foregroundColor: Colors.white,
      ),
      backgroundColor: AppColors.background,
      body: projectDataAsync.when(
        loading: () => const Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),
        error: (e, __) => Center(child: Padding(
          padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24.0),
          child: Text("خطأ في تحميل البيانات: $e", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(), textAlign: TextAlign.center),
        )),
        data: (project) {
          final contractor = project['contractors'];
          if (contractor == null) {
             return Center(child: Text("لم يتم العثور على مقاول لهذا المشروع", style: GoogleFonts.cairo()));
          }

          return SingleChildScrollView(
            padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24.0),
            child: Column(
              children: [
                _buildContractorInfo(contractor['user_name'] ?? "المقاول", project['title'] ?? ""),
                const SizedBox(height: 32),
                _buildStarsSection(),
                const SizedBox(height: 32),
                _buildSubRatings(),
                const SizedBox(height: 32),
                _buildCommentBox(),
                const SizedBox(height: 48),
                _buildSubmitButton(currentUser?.id ?? "", contractor['user_id'] ?? ""),
              ],
            ),
          );
        },
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildContractorInfo(String name, String projectTitle) {
    return Column(
      children: [
        const CircleAvatar(radius: 40, backgroundColor: AppColors.primary, child: Icon(Icons.person, size: 40, color: Colors.white)),
        const SizedBox(height: 12),
        Text(name, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 18)),
        Text("مشروع: $projectTitle", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 13)),
      ],
    );
  }

  Widget _buildStarsSection() {
    return Column(
      children: [
        Text("التقييم الكلي", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16)),
        Row(
          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
          children: List.generate(5, (index) {
            return IconButton(
              icon: Icon(index < _overallRating ? Icons.star : Icons.star_border, color: Colors.amber, size: 40),
              onPressed: () => setState(() => _overallRating = index + 1.0),
            );
          }),
        ),
        Text(_getRatingText(), style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: AppColors.primary, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 18)),
      ],
    );
  }

  String _getRatingText() {
    if (_overallRating == 5) return "ممتاز جداً 🤩";
    if (_overallRating >= 4) return "جيد جداً 😊";
    if (_overallRating >= 3) return "جيد 🙂";
    if (_overallRating >= 2) return "سيء 😕";
    return "سيء جداً 😞";
  }

  Widget _buildSubRatings() {
    return Column(
        children: [
            _buildSubRatingRow("جودة العمل", _qualityRating, (v) => setState(() => _qualityRating = v)),
            _buildSubRatingRow("الالتزام بالوقت", _timeRating, (v) => setState(() => _timeRating = v)),
            _buildSubRatingRow("التواصل", _commRating, (v) => setState(() => _commRating = v)),
            _buildSubRatingRow("السعر مقابل الجودة", _priceRating, (v) => setState(() => _priceRating = v)),
        ],
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSubRatingRow(String title, int value, Function(int) onChanged) {
    return Padding(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 8.0),
      child: Row(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
        children: [
          Text(title, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 14)),
          Row(
            children: List.generate(5, (index) {
              return InkWell(
                onTap: () => onChanged(index + 1),
                child: Icon(index < value ? Icons.star : Icons.star_border, color: Colors.amber, size: 24),
              );
            }),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildCommentBox() {
    return Column(
      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
      children: [
        Text("أضف تعليق (اختياري)", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 14)),
        const SizedBox(height: 8),
        TextField(
          controller: _commentController,
          maxLines: 4,
          decoration: InputDecoration(
            hintText: "اكتب تجربتك مع المقاول هنا...",
            hintStyle: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 12),
            filled: true,
            fillColor: Colors.white,
            border: OutlineInputBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12), borderSide: BorderSide.none),
          ),
        ),
      ],
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSubmitButton(String raterId, String ratedId) {
    return SizedBox(
      width: double.infinity,
      child: ElevatedButton(
        onPressed: _isSubmitting ? null : () => _submitRating(raterId, ratedId),
        style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
          backgroundColor: AppColors.primary, 
          foregroundColor: Colors.white, 
          padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16),
          shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12)),
        ),
        child: _isSubmitting 
          ? const CircularProgressIndicator(color: Colors.white)
          : Text("إرسال التقييم", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
      ),
    );
  }
}

```

## `lib/features/marketplace/presentation/screens/rate_product_screen.dart`
```dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:google_fonts/google_fonts.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import '../../../../core/theme/app_colors.dart';

class RateProductScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {
  final String productId;
  const RateProductScreen({super.key, required this.productId});

  @override
  ConsumerState<RateProductScreen> createState() => _RateProductScreenState();
}

class _RateProductScreenState extends ConsumerState<RateProductScreen> {
  double _rating = 5.0;
  final TextEditingController _commentController = TextEditingController();

  @override
  void dispose() {
    _commentController.dispose();
    super.dispose();
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text("تقييم المنتج", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16)),
        backgroundColor: AppColors.primary,
        foregroundColor: Colors.white,
      ),
      backgroundColor: AppColors.background,
      body: SingleChildScrollView(
        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24.0),
        child: Column(
          children: [
            _buildProductPreview(),
            const SizedBox(height: 32),
            _buildStarsSection(),
            const SizedBox(height: 32),
            _buildImageUpload(),
            const SizedBox(height: 32),
            _buildCommentBox(),
            const SizedBox(height: 48),
            _buildSubmitButton(),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildProductPreview() {
    return Column(
      children: [
        Container(
          width: 120,
          height: 120,
          decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.white, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)),
          child: const Center(child: Icon(Icons.inventory, size: 60, color: Colors.grey)),
        ),
        const SizedBox(height: 16),
        Text("إسمنت عمران مقاوم للأملاح", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 18), textAlign: TextAlign.center),
      ],
    );
  }

  Widget _buildStarsSection() {
    return Column(
      children: [
        Text("ما هو تقييمك للمنتج؟", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16)),
        const SizedBox(height: 12),
        Row(
          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
          children: List.generate(5, (index) {
            return IconButton(
              icon: Icon(index < _rating ? Icons.star : Icons.star_border, color: Colors.amber, size: 40),
              onPressed: () => setState(() => _rating = index + 1.0),
            );
          }),
        ),
      ],
    );
  }

  Widget _buildImageUpload() {
    return GestureDetector(
      onTap: () {},
      child: Container(
        width: double.infinity,
        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(color: Colors.white, borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16), border: Border.all(color: AppColors.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.1), style: BorderStyle.solid)),
        child: Column(
          children: [
            const Icon(Icons.add_a_photo_outlined, color: AppColors.primary, size: 30),
            const SizedBox(height: 8),
            Text("إرفاق صور للمنتج", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: AppColors.primary, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 13)),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildCommentBox() {
    return Column(
      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
      children: [
        Text("شاركنا تجربتك (اختياري)", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 14)),
        const SizedBox(height: 8),
        TextField(
          controller: _commentController,
          maxLines: 4,
          decoration: InputDecoration(
            hintText: "هل طابق المنتج المواصفات؟",
            hintStyle: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 12),
            filled: true,
            fillColor: Colors.white,
            border: OutlineInputBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12), borderSide: BorderSide.none),
          ),
        ),
      ],
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSubmitButton() {
    return SizedBox(
      width: double.infinity,
      child: ElevatedButton(
        onPressed: () => context.pop(),
        style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(backgroundColor: AppColors.primary, foregroundColor: Colors.white, padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16)),
        child: Text("إرسال التقييم", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
      ),
    );
  }
}

```

## `lib/features/marketplace/presentation/screens/rate_supplier_screen.dart`
```dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:google_fonts/google_fonts.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import '../../../../core/theme/app_colors.dart';

class RateSupplierScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {
  final String orderId;
  const RateSupplierScreen({super.key, required this.orderId});

  @override
  ConsumerState<RateSupplierScreen> createState() => _RateSupplierScreenState();
}

class _RateSupplierScreenState extends ConsumerState<RateSupplierScreen> {
  double _overallRating = 5.0;
  final TextEditingController _commentController = TextEditingController();

  @override
  void dispose() {
    _commentController.dispose();
    super.dispose();
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text("تقييم المورد", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16)),
        backgroundColor: AppColors.primary,
        foregroundColor: Colors.white,
      ),
      backgroundColor: AppColors.background,
      body: SingleChildScrollView(
        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24.0),
        child: Column(
          children: [
            _buildSupplierIcon(),
            const SizedBox(height: 12),
            Text("مؤسسة النور لمواد البناء", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 18)),
            Text("طلب رقم #${widget.orderId}", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 13)),
            const SizedBox(height: 32),
            _buildStarsSection(),
            const SizedBox(height: 32),
            _buildSubRatings(),
            const SizedBox(height: 32),
            _buildCommentBox(),
            const SizedBox(height: 48),
            _buildSubmitButton(),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSupplierIcon() {
    return const CircleAvatar(radius: 40, backgroundColor: AppColors.primary, child: Icon(Icons.store, size: 40, color: Colors.white));
  }

  Widget _buildStarsSection() {
    return Column(
      children: [
        Text("التقييم الكلي للمتجر", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16)),
        Row(
          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
          children: List.generate(5, (index) {
            return IconButton(
              icon: Icon(index < _overallRating ? Icons.star : Icons.star_border, color: Colors.amber, size: 40),
              onPressed: () => setState(() => _overallRating = index + 1.0),
            );
          }),
        ),
      ],
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSubRatings() {
    return Column(
        children: [
            _buildSubRatingRow("جودة المنتجات"),
            _buildSubRatingRow("سرعة التوصيل"),
            _buildSubRatingRow("التواصل معاملة المندوب"),
        ],
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSubRatingRow(String title) {
    return Padding(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 8.0),
      child: Row(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
        children: [
          Text(title, style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 14)),
          Row(
            children: List.generate(5, (index) {
              return Icon(index < 4 ? Icons.star : Icons.star_border, color: Colors.amber, size: 20);
            }),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildCommentBox() {
    return Column(
      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
      children: [
        Text("أضف تعليق (اختياري)", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 14)),
        const SizedBox(height: 8),
        TextField(
          controller: _commentController,
          maxLines: 4,
          decoration: InputDecoration(
            hintText: "اكتب تجربتك مع المورد هنا...",
            hintStyle: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontSize: 12),
            filled: true,
            fillColor: Colors.white,
            border: OutlineInputBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12), borderSide: BorderSide.none),
          ),
        ),
      ],
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSubmitButton() {
    return SizedBox(
      width: double.infinity,
      child: ElevatedButton(
        onPressed: () => context.pop(),
        style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(backgroundColor: AppColors.primary, foregroundColor: Colors.white, padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16)),
        child: Text("إرسال التقييم", style: GoogleFonts.cairo(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
      ),
    );
  }
}

```
